text.title: AARRR Pirate Metrics Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: activation regression detected; downstream tactics frozen.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Weekly snapshot 2026-W20. Acquisition flat, activation -18% vs baseline. Per rule top-down-read, downstream optimization frozen.

section.title: Output

list.item: All 5 stages with metric + baseline — rule metric-per-stage-with-baseline + weekly-all-five-published.
Tactics tagged with stage — rule tactic-stage-tagged.
Downstream stages NOT being optimized while activation leaks — rule top-down-read.
